name: Eaglewood Golf Course
about: The Golf Club at Eaglewood is a Par 72 championship USGA-certified course located at a resort hotel. The venue offers traditional outdoor golf with 18 and 9-hole play options, tournament planning, and event hosting capabilities. It also features a dedicated Foresight golf simulator available for rent by the hour, located within the Prairie River Bar and Grill. The resort setting provides a full-service experience with on-site dining, a pro shop, and various other recreational activities like bowling and spa services. Pricing varies by season, time of day, and includes mandatory cart fees, with simulator rentals costing $50 per hour.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service resort atmosphere combining traditional golf with a high-tech simulator experience
Variety of event options including night golf putting tournaments and group outings
Pro shop credit included with group packages and on-site dining available

food_and_drink.notes: Full Picnic Menu available for tournaments; American-style breakfast buffet available at Prairie River Restaurant
Bar service available at Prairie River Bar and Patio and during golf tournaments

simulator_hardware.notes: Private room connected to Prairie River Bar and Grill, accommodates up to 6 people

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available. Callaway XR or TaylorMade clubs cost $50 per set, and Callaway Mavrik clubs cost $60.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full kitchen and bar service, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted. On-course food and beverage are available via hospitality carts.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Regular play is typically 4-5 hours. Night golf events have an average playing time of 1.5 hours for the 4-hole event.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, junior rates are available for ages 12-16, and the resort features family-friendly amenities like a bowling alley and pool.
